codeReview.summary: The packet cleanly introduces the local testing ladder without weakening the existing merge gate: `dev-smoke` and `local-guard` are explicit scripts, manifest validation is fail-closed, Maven profiles keep `failIfNoTests=true`, and the new `.factory` command surfaces make the faster local loop reproducible instead of tribal knowledge. The scope stays inside the intended Lane 08 workflow surfaces (scripts, manifests, Maven wiring, services, and library guidance), and the recorded negative check proves an empty manifest is rejected before Maven can silently pass.

summary: PASS. The first Lane 08 packet adds a scoped, fail-closed local test ladder with explicit fast and pre-push commands while preserving the existing gate-fast merge-confidence baseline.
